title: erythroxylum guatemalense
intro: Erythroxylum guatemalense is a plant species native to Central America, also known as the Guatemalan coca, which is a member of the Erythroxylaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum guatemalense include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to make teas or tinctures that are used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
